summary: Iteration 257 — Preventivo PDF Generation Fixes testing complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Verified: 1) PDF endpoints return valid PDFs, 2) CSS has white background, 3) Conditional CODICE/SCONTI columns logic, 4) build_conditions_html accepts preventivo parameter, 5) Typo fixes applied, 6) Dynamic payment/validity/address replacements work, 7) Title appears exactly once.
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo preventivi (prev_demo_complete, prev_demo_simple, prev_demo_main)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventivo PDF generation fixes verified. Key implementations: 1) COMMON_CSS has @page background: white and body background-color: #ffffff. 2) has_codici/has_sconti logic at lines 1515-1518 in preventivi.py correctly hides columns when empty. 3) build_conditions_html at line 530 in pdf_template.py accepts optional preventivo parameter for dynamic values. 4) Typo fixes at lines 544-548 in pdf_template.py. 5) Dynamic replacements for payment (line 575), validity (line 583), delivery (line 592), and company address (line 566). 6) Title 'PREVENTIVO N.' appears exactly once at line 1659.
